purpose: Member-profile IDB storage (existing module, app/src/lib/marmot/groupStorage.ts). This story adds a per-member purge primitive (deleteMemberProfile) mirroring mergeMemberProfile's read-filter-rewrite pattern, and wires S1's PendingInviteStore account-wide marker clear into clearAllGroupData's account-reset composition root (AC-MARKER-9's account-reset half).

public_api.name: deleteMemberProfile
public_api.description: Loads the group's stored MemberProfile[] via loadMemberProfiles(groupId), filters out the entry whose pubkeyHex matches pubkey case-insensitively, and calls saveMemberProfiles(groupId, filtered) only when the filtered array's length differs from the loaded array (no-op write avoidance, mirroring mergeMemberProfile's zero-write-on-no-change convention at :79-102). No-op (does not throw) when no entry exists for that pubkey — this is the DeleteMemberProfileFn seam S9 consumes verbatim, no adaptation needed.

public_api.name: clearAllGroupData
public_api.description: Existing account-reset composition root, modified to additionally call PendingInviteStore's clearAllPendingDirectInvites() (S1's zero-arg full-clear export) alongside the four pre-existing clear() calls and the existing clearProfileRequestMemos('*') call. Ordering preserved; no early-abort coupling between the sequential clears (each already independent).

owned_data: idb-keyval store 'few-member-profiles' / 'profiles' — MemberProfile[] arrays keyed group:${groupId}
dependencies_allowed: ./pendingDirectInviteStorage (clearAllPendingDirectInvites — new import, S1's declared seam per architecture.md Implementation constraint 3)
dependencies_forbidden: app/src/context/* (this is a Storage-layer module; consumed only via context methods or injected Deps, per architecture.md Boundary rules)
app/src/lib/marmot/*Impl.ts (never imported directly into a pure-impl file)
./pendingDirectInviteStorage internals (only its exported clearAllPendingDirectInvites function, never its internal store handle or markerKey helper)
